# 🐞 Bug Report

## Summary
Provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

---

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Run '...'
4. Observe the issue.

---

## Expected Behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

---

## Actual Behavior
Describe what actually happened.

---

## Logs / Error Messages

Paste logs here

## Screenshots

---

## Possible Cause (Optional)

If you have an idea of what caused the issue, describe it here.

---

## Additional Context

Add any other information that may help reproduce or resolve the issue.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before submitting this report.
- [ ] I can consistently reproduce this bug.
- [ ] I have included the necessary logs or screenshots (if available).
- [ ] I have provided enough information to reproduce the issue.
